title: Collections, Taxonomy, Ordering, Navigation, Feeds, and Sitemaps · Stakeholder Software Mission
summary: A public-service information architect. They need context-safe semantic HTML, strict autoescaped layouts, collision-free multilingual routes, redirects, meaningful navigation, feeds, sitemaps, and broken-link evidence that remain correct under a project subpath and changed content titles. Planned artifact: Deliver Safe Semantic Renderer and Stable Route System with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit…
objectives: Encode untrusted text and attribute values for their exact HTML context and reject unsafe script, style, comment, and URL placements.
Create one configured Jinja environment with bounded loader roots, explicit autoescape, StrictUndefined, deterministic globals, and version evidence.
Separate stable content identity from mutable title, source path, output path, display label, and public URL.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-feed-sitemap-1x2b6s
# Competency: ssg-feed-sitemap.
# Case 8667: a compromised-content recovery rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: reconcile content, routes, navigation, links, assets, feeds, sitemaps, output files, and artifact digests before approval.
# Changed case: rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence.
def evidence_ssg_feed_sitemap_1x2b6s(published: int = 13, navigable: int = 13, taxonomy_terms: int = 5, feed_entries: int = 13, sitemap_urls: int = 13) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1x2b6s = "1x2b6s-s6b2x1-8667"
    assert evidence_variant_1x2b6s
    evidence_axes_1x2b6s = (
        "reader1x2b6s",
        "source8667",
        "parses6b2x1",
        "route1x2b6s8667",
        "artifact86671x2b6s",
        "recoverys6b2x18667",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1x2b6s)) == 6
    if published < 1 or navigable < 0:
        return False, navigable, "publication-count"
    if navigable != published:
        return False, navigable, "orphan-route"
    if taxonomy_terms < 1:
        return False, taxonomy_terms, "taxonomy-shape"
    if feed_entries != published or sitemap_urls != published:
        return False, feed_entries, "derived-publication-drift"
    assert feed_entries == sitemap_urls == published
    return True, navigable, "reconciled-site-graph"
